Feature:AMO001 Get Member Wallet Balance 188ms 5

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant wallet balance API
So that I can retrieve the member wallet balance for one or more currencies

Scenario:
Get balances for requested currencies
103ms 4

Given a merchant member exists 2ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

When APISYS requests member wallet balances with: 101ms
field value
platform_username <platform_username>
currencies ["CNY","THB"]
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY",
            "THB"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 100.125,
                "THB": 0
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Info 

Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY",
            "THB"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 100.125,
                "THB": 0
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Then the AMO001 response should be successful < 1ms

And the response should contain balances for: < 1ms
field value
platform_username <platform_username>
currencies ["CNY","THB"]

Scenario:
Validation fails when platform username is empty
27ms 3

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

When APISYS requests member wallet balances with: 26ms
field value
platform_username
currencies ["CNY","THB"]
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY",
            "THB"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "platform_username",
                "message": "\"platform_username\" is not allowed to be empty"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Info 

Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY",
            "THB"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "platform_username",
                "message": "\"platform_username\" is not allowed to be empty"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Then the AMO001 response should fail validation < 1ms

When APISYS requests member wallet balances with: 17ms

currencies ["CNY","THB"]
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "invalid_username",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY",
            "THB"
          ]
        }

        {
          "status": 404,
          "body": {
            "error": {
              "platform_username": "invalid_username"
            },
            "message": "User not found",
            "code": 404,
            "message_code": 14008
          }
        }

Scenario:
Validation fails when a currency in the array is invalid

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info +

        supermerchant1user

When APISYS requests member wallet balances with: 23ms
field value
platform_username <platform_username>
currencies ["USD","MYR","INVALID"]
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "USD",
            "MYR",
            "INVALID"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "currencies.1",
                "message": "Each currency must be one of: CNY,VND,USDT,THB,TRY,INR,AUD,PHP,BRL,MXN,NPR,BDT,IDR,KRW,JPY,HKD,PKR,RON,DKK,NOK,MMK,TWD,CUP,USD,EUR,GBP,CHF,CAD,RUB,KES,KKC,LUCK,MYX"
              },
              {
                "key": "currencies.2",
                "message": "Each currency must be one of: CNY,VND,USDT,THB,TRY,INR,AUD,PHP,BRL,MXN,NPR,BDT,IDR,KRW,JPY,HKD,PKR,RON,DKK,NOK,MMK,TWD,CUP,USD,EUR,GBP,CHF,CAD,RUB,KES,KKC,LUCK,MYX"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Info 

Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance

            "INVALID"
          ]
        }
    Response:

          "status": 400,

            "error": [
              {

                "message": "Each currency must be one of: CNY,VND,USDT,THB,TRY,INR,AUD,PHP,BRL,MXN,NPR,BDT,IDR,KRW,JPY,HKD,PKR,RON,DKK,NOK,MMK,TWD,CUP,USD,EUR,GBP,CHF,CAD,RUB,KES,KKC,LUCK,MYX"

Feature:AMO013 Notify Wager Update 204ms 3

As APISYS
I want to notify the merchant of wager updates
So that the merchant can receive wager update events for supported wallet modes

Scenario:
Notify merchant with a single wager update
175ms 3

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

When APISYS notifies wager update with payload: 174ms 

{
  "notification_type": "(notification_type)",
  "notifications": [
    {
      "game_type": "(game_type_transfer_wallet)",
      "game_key": "(game_key_transfer_wallet)",
      "wager_no": "(wager_no)",
      "origin_wager_no": null,
      "ticket_no": "(ticket_no)",
      "platform_username": "(platform_username)",
      "type": (wager_type.normal_wager),
      "status": (wager_status.settled),
      "currency": "(currency)",
      "amount": 10.1,
      "payment_amount": 10.1,
      "effective_amount": 10,
      "profit_and_loss": 5.1,
      "wager_time": (wager_time),
      "settlement_time": (settlement_time),
      "is_system_reward": (is_system_reward)
    }
  ]
}
 Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:8082/wager/notify
    Payload:
        {
          "notification_type": "typeA",
          "notifications": [
            {
              "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
              "game_key": "PT_SLOT",
              "wager_no": "wager-1774000037455-1h9tij",
              "origin_wager_no": null,
              "ticket_no": "ticket-2ec2645a-415e-4e94-aa3b-d4c85d2575af",
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "type": 1,
              "status": 2,
              "currency": "CNY",
              "amount": 10.1,
              "payment_amount": 10.1,
              "effective_amount": 10,
              "profit_and_loss": 5.1,
              "wager_time": 1774000037,
              "settlement_time": 1774000037,
              "is_system_reward": false
            }
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": null,
            "message": "Mock success case"
          }
        }

Info

{
  "notification_type": "(notification_type)",
  "notifications": [
    {
      "game_type": "(game_type_transfer_wallet)",
      "game_key": "(game_key_transfer_wallet)",
      "wager_no": "(wager_no)",
      "origin_wager_no": "(origin_wager_no)",
      "ticket_no": "(ticket_no)",
      "platform_username": "(platform_username)",
      "type": "(wager_type.normal_wager)",
      "status": "(wager_status.resettled)",
      "currency": "(currency)",
      "amount": 10.1,
      "payment_amount": 10.1,
      "effective_amount": 10,
      "profit_and_loss": 5.1,
      "wager_time": (wager_time),
      "settlement_time": (settlement_time),
      "is_system_reward": (is_system_reward)
    },
    {
      "game_type": "(game_type_seamless)",

      "wager_no": "(wager_no)",
      "origin_wager_no": null,

      "status": "(wager_status.settled)",
      "currency": "(currency)",

      "effective_amount": 5,
      "profit_and_loss": 0,
      "wager_time": (wager_time),
      "settlement_time": null,
      "is_system_reward": false

  ]

Feature:AMO003 Seamless Request Payment 354ms 5

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant request payment API
So that I can deduct wager payment from the member wallet

Scenario:
Successful request payment deducts wallet balance
170ms 8

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Given the member has positive wallet balance in "<currency>" 23ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 100.125
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Balance:
    CNY:
        100.125

Info 

Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 100.125
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Balance:
    CNY:
        100.125

And I record the current wallet balance in "<currency>" 19ms Show Info +

Balance:
    CNY:
        100.125

And I prepare a valid amount less than the balance by 10 1ms Show Info + 
Amount to deduct: 90.125:
    currency:
        CNY
    balance:
        100.125
    extra:
        10

Info 

Amount to deduct: 90.125:
    currency:
        CNY
    balance:
        100.125
    extra:
        10

When APISYS requests payment with: 103ms
field value
platform_username <platform_username>
transaction_no <transaction_no>
currency <currency>
amount -<deduction_amount>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-payment
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "transaction_no": "ae8d276b-215e-4e3b-b0db-fe608a000528",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "-90.125"
        }

        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "2224d7b6-1144-42c9-89da-e30a89cdb761",
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-payment
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "transaction_no": "4f680f8a-1d53-4a4f-973b-f6fe20da4221",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "5"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "amount",
                "message": "\"amount\" must be a negative number"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Feature:AMO007 Seamless Settle Wager 382ms 5

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant settle wager API
So that I can apply wager settlement results to the member wallet

Scenario:
Full settlement increases wallet balance by settlement amount
82ms 6

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

        }

          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {

            },
            "message": "Success"

        }

When APISYS settles a wager with: 42ms
field value
transaction_no <transaction_no>
game_key <game_key>
wager_no <wager_no>
platform_username <platform_username>
type <wager_type.normal_wager>
currency <currency>
amount 25.75
effective_amount 25.75
settlement_time <settlement_time>
metadata <metadata>
metadata_type <metadata_type>
is_system_reward <is_system_reward>
is_partial_settlement false
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/settle-wager
    Payload:
        {
          "transaction_no": "4e6f08ae-6c47-46b5-af06-24a35a97aafb",
          "game_key": "",
          "wager_no": "wager-1774000038057-knt0qu",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "type": "1",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "25.75",
          "effective_amount": "25.75",
          "settlement_time": "1774000038",
          "metadata": {
            "order_no": "5d8c05a2-a3b0-4534-b983-9a84d8a422af",
            "origin_order_no": "287352a2-1f71-44a4-8dfb-8b336e7a646f",
            "origin_sub_order_no": "cc6b0c16-490c-438a-8623-b52cd1f95359"
          },
          "metadata_type": "ggl-settle-wager",
          "is_system_reward": "false",
          "is_partial_settlement": "false"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "e67f0f78-2e41-4499-b92a-6e23e55f5402"
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 35.75
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Wallet balance check:
    Currency:
        CNY
    Before:
        10
    After:
        35.75
    Expected increase:
        25.75
    Expected:
        35.75

When APISYS settles a wager with: 48ms
field value
transaction_no <transaction_no>
game_key <game_key>
wager_no <wager_no>
platform_username <platform_username>
type <wager_type.normal_wager>
currency <currency>
amount 10
effective_amount 10
settlement_time <settlement_time>
metadata <metadata>
metadata_type <metadata_type>
is_system_reward <is_system_reward>
is_partial_settlement false
partial_settlement_history [{ "transaction_no": "<partial_transaction_no_1>", "amount": 2.5, "settlement_time": <settlement_time> }, { "transaction_no": "<partial_transaction_no_2>", "amount": 1, "settlement_time": <settlement_time> }]
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/settle-wager
    Payload:
        {
          "transaction_no": "ea590bd0-9eac-4943-a967-986ac1c24c46",
          "game_key": "",
          "wager_no": "wager-1774000038141-2un6lv",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "type": "1",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "10",
          "effective_amount": "10",
          "settlement_time": "1774000038",
          "metadata": {
            "order_no": "46a1c8bb-6d39-47dc-b31c-80a8ca3e0b4e",
            "origin_order_no": "b39d74ba-5f72-4743-b87e-e449fc98929d",
            "origin_sub_order_no": "6c43634b-f24f-4b6c-a338-c66c498aa81b"
          },
          "metadata_type": "ggl-settle-wager",
          "is_system_reward": "false",
          "is_partial_settlement": "false",
          "partial_settlement_history": [
            {
              "transaction_no": "aa1af2e0-1141-4789-9a4e-6930ddaa1ce1",
              "amount": 2.5,
              "settlement_time": 1774000038
            },
            {
              "transaction_no": "bd5fcd97-cc4f-4bac-b077-7f1a6a1e2067",
              "amount": 1,
              "settlement_time": 1774000038
            }
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "e71c62b0-6c9d-4a49-95ad-11c01127d570"
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

          "partial_settlement_history": [
            {
              "transaction_no": "1ebd9d77-0c1f-4a96-8b58-324472f48747",
              "amount": 5,
              "settlement_time": 1774000038
            }
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "9b4b31b5-424b-4f32-92c6-dc24cb00b3d6"
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Then the AMO007 response should be successful < 1ms

And the response should contain: < 1ms
field value
reference_id any non-empty value

Reject settlement when amount precision exceeds 6 decimal places
20ms 3

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

When APISYS settles a wager with: 19ms
field value
transaction_no <transaction_no>
game_key <game_key>
wager_no <wager_no>
platform_username <platform_username>
type <wager_type.normal_wager>
currency <currency>
amount 1.1234567
effective_amount 1.1234567
settlement_time <settlement_time>
metadata <metadata>
metadata_type <metadata_type>
is_system_reward <is_system_reward>
is_partial_settlement false
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/settle-wager
    Payload:
        {
          "transaction_no": "2891741a-9de7-4e59-9cc9-cff70d4de5e1",
          "game_key": "",
          "wager_no": "wager-1774000038426-xefm6w",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "type": "1",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "1.1234567",
          "effective_amount": "1.1234567",
          "settlement_time": "1774000038",
          "metadata": {
            "order_no": "ea66471a-bf5b-4bd2-b2eb-ec0ebd3dd0df",
            "origin_order_no": "c15336b3-1636-459d-999e-5ba53b05d451",
            "origin_sub_order_no": "58f2a9e6-4dbb-40f3-bf49-cd0866eebe0b"
          },
          "metadata_type": "ggl-settle-wager",
          "is_system_reward": "false",
          "is_partial_settlement": "false"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "amount",
                "message": "Amount must be a number with maximum 6 decimal places"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Info 

Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/settle-wager
    Payload:
        {
          "transaction_no": "2891741a-9de7-4e59-9cc9-cff70d4de5e1",
          "game_key": "",
          "wager_no": "wager-1774000038426-xefm6w",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "type": "1",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "1.1234567",

            "origin_sub_order_no": "58f2a9e6-4dbb-40f3-bf49-cd0866eebe0b"
          },
          "metadata_type": "ggl-settle-wager",
          "is_system_reward": "false",
          "is_partial_settlement": "false"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "amount",
                "message": "Amount must be a number with maximum 6 decimal places"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Then the AMO007 response should fail validation < 1ms

Feature:AMO008 Seamless Cancel Wager 16ms 1

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant cancel wager API
So that I can refund a previously paid wager

Scenario:
Cancel wager refunds a prepared paid wager
16ms 2 3 2

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Given I record the current wallet balance in "<currency>" 15ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 64.25
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

    CNY:
        64.25

And a prepared paid wager fixture exists for: < 1ms
field value
wager_no <wager_no>
parent_wager_no <parent_wager_no>
payment_order_no <payment_order_no>
currency <currency>
payment_amount 30 

Then(/^a prepared paid wager fixture exists for:$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

When APISYS cancels a wager with: < 1ms
field value
transaction_no <transaction_no>
wager_no <wager_no> 

Then(/^APISYS cancels a wager with:$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

Then the AMO008 response should be successful < 1ms 

Then(/^the AMO008 response should be successful$/, function(callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

And the response should contain: < 1ms
field value
reference_id any non-empty value

And the wallet balance in "<currency>" should increase by 30 < 1ms

Feature:AMO009 Seamless Resettle Wager 158ms 2

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant resettle wager API
So that I can apply corrected settlement amounts

Resettlement increases the wallet balance

        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance

        }

< 1ms 13

Feature:Integration Flow - Request payment then cancel wager < 1ms 1

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant wallet APIs in sequence
So that I can verify paid wager cancellation refund flow end to end

Scenario:
Request payment 30 then cancel wager refunds the same 30
< 1ms 10 1

Given a merchant member exists with platform username "<platform_username>" < 1ms 

Then(/^a merchant member exists with platform username "([^"]*)"$/, function(arg1, callback) {
  // Write code here that turns the phrase above into concrete actions
  callback(null, 'pending');
});

currency balance
<currency> 100 

Then(/^the member wallet has balances:$/, function(callback) {

  callback(null, 'pending');
});

wager_no
parent_wager_no <parent_wager_no>

  callback(null, 'pending');
});

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant transfer in API
So that I can credit funds into the member wallet

Scenario:
Transfer in increases wallet balance
71ms 6

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Given I record the current wallet balance in "<currency>" 17ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 72.5
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

    CNY:
        72.5

game_type <game_type_transfer_wallet>

currency <currency>
amount 75.125
session_id <session_id>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-in
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "1f78c51d-f5fb-4d5f-89a8-81499bd67806",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "75.125",
          "session_id": "478e30e7-9eb5-4e20-b780-fa9c644148cf"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "aac8cf0d-b3c9-4a75-9bc9-e57bc31571c2",
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 197.625
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Balance:
    CNY:
        197.625

Then the AMO010 response should be successful < 1ms

And the response should contain: < 1ms
field value
reference_id any non-empty value
status 1

And the wallet balance in "<currency>" should remain unchanged 21ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 197.625
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Wallet balance check (unchanged):
    Currency:
        CNY
    Before:
        197.625
    After:
        197.625
    Expected:
        197.625

Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-in
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "f7962dcb-aa95-478b-b30a-0ca09ee47a73",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "1.1234567",
          "session_id": "957e05d4-7667-41f2-9dcc-53687a3d4303"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "amount",
                "message": "Amount must be a number with maximum 6 decimal places"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

        }

          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "63707ab7-4b02-4316-b536-3f67bc1809a1",

            },
            "message": "Success"

Feature:AMO011 Request Transfer Out 583ms 9 2

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant transfer out API
So that I can debit funds from the member wallet

Scenario:
Transfer out decreases wallet balance
79ms 7

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Given the member has positive wallet balance in "<currency>" 19ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 217.625
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Balance:
    CNY:
        217.625

When APISYS requests transfer out with: 30ms
field value
transfer_no <transfer_no>
game_type <game_type_transfer_wallet>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount -20.5
session_id <session_id>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-out
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "a276a87d-348f-4dad-8c19-1b61b8150d4c",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "-20.5",
          "session_id": "27e61441-ebc6-4c6d-ae96-131b12c6dd5c"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "4111914a-f058-4953-95cb-03dd67232198",
              "amount": -20.5,
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Info

        }

Then the AMO011 response should be successful < 1ms

And the response should contain: < 1ms
field value
reference_id any non-empty value
amount -20.5
status 1

And the wallet balance in "<currency>" should decrease by 20.5 13ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 197.125
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

        CNY
    Before:

    After:
        197.125

        20.5

        182.125

field value
transfer_no <transfer_no>
game_type <game_type_transfer_wallet>

currency <currency>
session_id <session_id>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-out
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "00123083-8a8d-4ae0-9841-50f7cbe6c70a",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "session_id": "a1b181cb-a189-4c01-83a6-3ee6f2d7c0fe"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "22dd806a-0979-448b-9c5a-3567bdeca235",
              "amount": -182,
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Info 

Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-out
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "00123083-8a8d-4ae0-9841-50f7cbe6c70a",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "session_id": "a1b181cb-a189-4c01-83a6-3ee6f2d7c0fe"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,

              "reference_id": "22dd806a-0979-448b-9c5a-3567bdeca235",

              "status": 1

          }
        }

Then the AMO011 response should be successful < 1ms

And the response should contain: < 1ms
field value
reference_id any non-empty value
status 1

And the response amount should equal the integer part of the recorded wallet balance in "<currency>" < 1ms

And the wallet balance in "<currency>" should equal the remaining decimal balance 25ms Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 0.125
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Remaining decimal check:
    Currency:
        CNY
    Before:
        182.125
    After:
        0.125
    Expected:
        0.125

When APISYS requests transfer out with: 12ms
field value
transfer_no <transfer_no>
game_type <game_type_transfer_wallet>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount -1.1234567
session_id <session_id>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-out
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "da73473f-121d-43a8-96f5-99fadf706edb",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "-1.1234567",
          "session_id": "18528833-5f58-4bd5-8396-099d98f66308"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 400,
          "body": {
            "error": [
              {
                "key": "amount",
                "message": "Amount must be a number with maximum 6 decimal places"
              }
            ],
            "message": "Parameter error",
            "code": 400,
            "message_code": 11028
          }
        }

Info

    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-out

              "status": 2
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Feature:AMO014 Request Cancel Transfer 260ms 3

As APISYS
I want to call the merchant cancel transfer API
So that I can reverse a previous transfer ledger

Scenario:
Cancel transfer returns reference_id for an existing transfer in and is idempotent
141ms 9

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Given a successful transfer in exists for: 68ms
field value
transfer_no <transfer_no>
game_type <game_type_transfer_wallet>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount 20
session_id <session_id>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-in
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "255b18c5-81f4-43a5-9e35-0ef99ca4b66f",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "20",
          "session_id": "9100c5a2-1ada-44a4-a948-a6eb8fd0106d"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "f20689a0-222e-48d3-a6f6-6c8ab4818349",
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Feature:Integration Flow - Transfer wallet lifecycle 249ms 1

As APISYS
I want to call transfer APIs in sequence
So that I can verify wallet balance changes and transfer reversal end to end

Scenario:
Transfer in, transfer out, cancel transfer, and idempotent cancel
249ms 21

Given a merchant member exists < 1ms Show Info + 
Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Info 

Setup:
    platform_username:
        supermerchant1user

Given I record the current wallet balance in "<currency>" 14ms Show Info +

    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 0.125
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 100.125
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
Balance:
    CNY:
        100.125

When APISYS requests transfer out with: 32ms
field value
transfer_no <transfer_no_2>
game_type <game_type_transfer_wallet>
platform_username <platform_username>
currency <currency>
amount -35
session_id <session_id>
Show Info + 
Request:
    API:
        POST http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/request-transfer-out
    Payload:
        {
          "transfer_no": "4a3897fd-8aea-4447-9afb-1d0f5070999b",
          "game_type": "PT_SLOT",
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currency": "CNY",
          "amount": "-35",
          "session_id": "d0c97294-fe3c-44bb-815e-da11d3b1c56e"
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "reference_id": "268dc692-fefa-4d9b-ac46-c0f4576578bc",
              "amount": -35,
              "status": 1
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }

Request:
    API:
        GET http://localhost:4000/api/v1/transfer-wallet/balance
    Payload:
        {
          "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
          "currencies": [
            "CNY"
          ]
        }
    Response:
        {
          "status": 200,
          "body": {
            "code": 200,
            "data": {
              "platform_username": "supermerchant1user",
              "balances": {
                "CNY": 65.125
              }
            },
            "message": "Success"
          }
        }
